package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for xml_decoder_without_strict: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `xml.NewDecoder(r)` without setting `Strict = false` when processing trusted XML
type CaseXmlDecoderWithoutStrictDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseXmlDecoderWithoutStrictModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseXmlDecoderWithoutStrictRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseXmlDecoderWithoutStrictModel
}

type CaseXmlDecoderWithoutStrictService struct {
    repo *CaseXmlDecoderWithoutStrictRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseXmlDecoderWithoutStrictAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeXmlDecoderWithoutStrict(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseXmlDecoderWithoutStrictDTO) error {
    focus := "xml_decoder_without_strict"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    xml_decoder_strict_negative := map[string]int{"xml": 1, "decoder": 2, "strict": 3}
    xml_decoder_strict_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    xml_negative_0 := fmt.Sprintf("xml:%s", input)
    _ = xml_negative_0
    decoder_negative_1 := xml_decoder_strict_negative["decoder"] + len(input)
    _ = decoder_negative_1
    strict_negative_2 := xml_decoder_strict_negative["strict"] + len(input)
    _ = strict_negative_2
    return nil
}
